narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: सर्दी के बाद सीधे आ रही गर्मी, आखिर कैसे गायब हो गया बसंत का मौसम?
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The headline and repeated emphasis on the disappearance of the spring season frames climate change as causing a direct, alarming, and unnatural disruption to familiar seasonal patterns, which amplifies concern and fear about its impacts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: पर्यावरण में हो रहे बदलाव का दुष्प्रभाव अब किसी से छुपा नहीं है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement presents environmental changes as having unequivocally negative effects ('दुष्प्रभाव') that are now obvious to everyone, which serves to amplify a sense of urgency and fear regarding the consequences.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: इन क्षेत्रों में अब सर्दी जैसे ठंडे तापमान से सीधे तौर पर गर्म परिस्थितियों वाले अचानक बदलाव की आशंका प्रबल हो गई है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote explicitly highlights a 'strong apprehension' of a sudden and drastic shift from cold to hot conditions, framing it as a new and threatening norm, which amplifies fears about climate instability.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कई भारतीयों का कहना है कि बसंत का मौसम जैसे गायब सा हो गया है. तापमान अब काफी जल्दी सर्दी से गर्मी जैसी परिस्थितियों में बदल जाता है.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote emphasizes the perceived loss of a traditional season and the rapid, disruptive shift in weather patterns, reinforcing fears about the tangible and immediate impacts of climate change on daily life and natural cycles.
